enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his first full day back at work after weeks off, getting unexpectedly high from cannabis-infused food/drink, and working on a personal data project comparing athletic performance across age divisions in rowing and triathlon. He also talks about getting back into physical shape, a lingering shoulder injury from the gym, and the pleasures of spring in Boulder.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: being high while doing data work
stances.position: net positive — generates thorough ideas but slows you down; still worth it
small injuries get worse without exercise; staying active is essential for healing
keeping it up as a routine is rewarding and could become a useful personal documentary
not doing them right now because he's not in that kind of shape
